name: Chili con Carne
tagline: Slow-simmered Texas-style chili with chuck, dried chilies, beer
highlight: No beans (Texas style), no soy — just beef, chili, and time

hero.alt: Chili con carne with cheese and onion
hero.caption: chili — Texas slow

healthFacts: Slow-cooked chuck breaks collagen down to gelatin — silky body.
Dried chilies provide capsaicin (anti-inflammatory) and carotenoids.

steps.title: Toast and rehydrate
steps.detail: Toast chilies in a dry pot 30 sec per side. Cover with hot water 15 min, then blend with the soaking liquid into a smooth paste.
steps.tip: Use the soak liquid in the blend — that's where the chili water-soluble flavor lives.

steps.title: Brown the beef
steps.detail: In a heavy pot, brown beef in batches over high. Set aside. Sweat onion 5 min, garlic 1 min in the rendered fat.

steps.title: Bloom and deglaze
steps.detail: Stir in tomato paste, cumin, oregano; cook 2 min. Pour in beer and scrape the fond. Add chili paste and stock.
steps.tip: Deglazing is non-negotiable — those brown bits ARE the flavor.

steps.title: Slow simmer
steps.detail: Return beef. Cover, simmer 90 min until beef shreds with a fork. Last 20 min uncovered to thicken.
steps.tip: Better the next day. Make ahead if you can.
